cases.name: negative maxRetries is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry policy maxRetries must be an integer between 0 and 5.

cases.name: fractional maxRetries is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry policy maxRetries must be an integer between 0 and 5.

cases.name: maxRetries above the bound is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry policy maxRetries must be an integer between 0 and 5.

cases.name: coverage and plan IDs must match
cases.expectError: Stage 5 coverage mismatch: coverage plan ID "different-plan" does not match plan ID "stage5-plan".

cases.name: plan and source IDs must match
cases.expectError: Stage 5 source mismatch: plan source ID "different-source" does not match source ID "stage5-source".

cases.name: coverage cannot reference an unknown planned section
cases.expectError: Stage 5 coverage references unknown planned section "unknown-section".

cases.name: planned source references must exist
cases.expectError: Stage 5 planned section "planned-concept-card-0" references missing source block ID "missing-block".

cases.name: coverage is required
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry requires a coverage report.

cases.name: plan is required
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry requires a generation plan.

cases.name: source is required
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry requires a normalized source.

cases.name: provider is required
cases.expectError: Stage 5 retry requires a generation provider.
